calls.title: Contract with Teachable
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-09
ATTENDEES: Farhan Raja, Kevin Codde (kevin.codde@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Farhan Raja
STAGE: Negotiation / Closed

---
SUMMARY
Existing Teachable customer (UK-based) finalizing Teachable Pay migration contract. Currently on direct Stripe at 1.5% + 20p (UK rate). Moving to Teachable Pay at 1.8% + 30c with 0% back office fee. Main draw is Apple Pay, Google Pay, and reduced checkout friction. Agreed to sign contract this evening.

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Accepted slightly higher rate for additional payment options
Authority: Decision maker, signing contract
Need: Reduced checkout friction with Apple Pay, Google Pay, BNPL
Timeline: Signing today, migration later this week

---
RISKS / OBJECTIONS
- Rate is slightly higher (1.8% vs 1.5%)
- Concerned about future rate increases (assured rates are locked)
- Asked about 6-month opt-out smoothness

---
NEXT STEPS
Kevin:
- Process signed contract
- Team to reach out for migration walkthrough

Customer:
- Sign contract this evening
- Pick a day later in the week for migration

---

CALL DATE: 2026-03-09
ATTENDEES: Steve Kinney, Zach McCall (zach.mccall@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Steve Kinney
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Steve Kinney is a professional video producer and audio engineer migrating from Thinkific. Sells high-production-quality courses on music production (Luna course, Art of the Vocal, Art of the Mix). Currently sells via Shopify and hosts on Thinkific with Discord for community. Needs seamless Shopify-Teachable-Discord integration. Also interested in YouTube Shopping integration which is a key blocker for moving payments to Teachable Pay.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Sell premium video courses on music/audio production
Audience: Musicians, audio engineers (not always computer literate)
Business model: Course sales via Shopify, content on Teachable, community on Discord
Content types: High-quality 4K multi-cam video (25+ modules per course, 20-100GB per course after compression)
Scale expectations: ~5 courses planned, growing YouTube channel

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Open to custom development, interested in revenue-share subscription model
Authority: Decision maker (wife is business partner, opposed to switching payments from Shopify)
Need: Seamless user experience across Shopify, Teachable, Discord. Migration from Thinkific.
Timeline: Content nearly ready, meeting with Tim on Friday for technical scoping

---
RISKS / OBJECTIONS
- Wife opposed to moving payments from Shopify due to YouTube Shopping integration
- YouTube Shopping only works with Shopify, critical for conversion
- Had bad experience with Zapier automation on Thinkific

---
NEXT STEPS
Zach:
- Check on YouTube Shopping compatibility
- Set up call with Tim (Friday) for technical flow design
- Send proposal with pricing
- Explore partnership/ad read opportunity

Customer:
- Finish rendering last video
- Meet with Tim on Friday

calls.title: Connect With Teachable
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-06
ATTENDEES: Cristina Collado (Plus Grade), Zach McCall (zach.mccall@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Plus Grade (formerly Okie, recently acquired)
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Plus Grade provides hotel upselling software. They use free courses to train hotel front desk agents on upselling techniques and tool usage. Currently on Thinkific but forced to leave due to cybersecurity concerns flagged during acquisition due diligence. Low course revenue (~EUR 1,000 in 4 years). Based in the Netherlands.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Train hotel clients on upselling techniques and software usage
Audience: Hotel front desk agents and managers
Business model: Free courses for customers (100% discount codes), courses priced to deter competitors
Content types: Pre-recorded video courses with sequential completion
Scale: Small course catalog, customer-facing training

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Not discussed in detail. Pricing presented at $6,500/yr (2yr discount at $6,000/yr)
Authority: Cristina is evaluating. Must present shortlist to manager, then procurement.
Need: Replace Thinkific due to cybersecurity issue from acquisition. Need progress reporting for hotel managers.
Timeline: ASAP. Manager on holiday, reconnect week of March 16.

---
RISKS
- Unknown cybersecurity issue that caused Thinkific departure. Could affect Teachable too.
- Recently acquired by larger company. Procurement process unknown and potentially slow.
- Very low course revenue. Primary value is customer enablement, not direct revenue.

---
NEXT STEPS
Zach: Send recap, pricing, sales deck, test account, Teachable U student access.
Customer: Clarify cybersecurity issue, present shortlist to manager.
Scheduled: Follow-up Friday March 16 week.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJFZYVA4ZGQ0C20BX34YBGHH

calls.title: Chavonne Stewart and Kevin Codde
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-05
ATTENDEES: Chavonne D. Stewart (Rehoboth Fellowship International), Kevin Codde (kevin.codde@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Rehoboth Fellowship International
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Nonprofit ministry launching Rehoboth Fellowship Bible Institute. Starting with 5-10 continuing education courses in August 2026, with a 12-year vision to build a full seminary college. Expecting 50-75 students in year one with 10% annual growth. Charging for courses with member vs non-member pricing. Currently using Wix for website.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Launch Bible Institute offering religious studies courses with certifications
Audience: Fellowship members and external students (50-75 year one)
Business model: Paid courses with tiered pricing (member discount vs non-member rate)
Content types: Pre-recorded video, live virtual sessions (hybrid), audio, quizzes
Scale: 5-10 courses initially, growing to full seminary over 12 years

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Not discussed. Builder plan at $69/mo recommended as starting point.
Authority: Chavonne is evaluator. Dr. Brian Hodges is visionary/decision-maker (not on call).
Need: LMS for Bible Institute launch. Courses, certs, badges, live sessions, community.
Timeline: Go-live August 2026. One more evaluation meeting next week, then decision.

---
RISKS
- Decision-maker (Dr. Hodges) was not on the call.
- Very small initial student base (50-75). May not justify higher-tier plans.
- 12-year growth vision. Current needs are modest.

---
NEXT STEPS
Kevin: Follow up with contact info.
Customer: Share info with team, one more meeting next week, then decide.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KK01Y0EBEJ2DYW9M2R2T1QQ2

calls.title: Lauren Bendersky and Kevin Codde
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-05
ATTENDEES: Lauren Bendersky (Grapevine), Kevin Codde (kevin.codde@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Grapevine
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Grapevine is a medical supply ordering platform for practices. Strong retention but struggling with early adoption. Sales teams work with account admins, but end users (shoppers) don't get adequate onboarding. Currently using Scribe ($28/mo) for step-by-step guides but lack tracking/completion data. Exploring LMS for structured customer onboarding. Key requirement is embedding into their web platform via iframe with SSO.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Structured onboarding for end users (shoppers) of their supply ordering platform
Audience: ~500 current users, primarily new customers going forward
Business model: Free internal/customer training (not selling courses)
Content types: Screenshots, product walkthroughs, video, quizzes
Scale: ~500 existing users, focus on new customer onboarding

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: No set budget. Currently paying $28/mo for Scribe. Company willing to invest to solve early adoption problem.
Authority: Lauren is evaluator. Must present comparison to team.
Need: Structured onboarding to improve early adoption. Tracking completion. Embedding into platform.
Timeline: 30 days to make a decision. Discovery phase, meeting multiple vendors.

---
RISKS
- Embedding/iframe is a critical requirement. Not currently supported (on roadmap). Kevin to follow up.
- Evaluating multiple competitors. Teachable was first demo. 3-4 more demos same day.
- Enterprise pricing may be too high for ~500 user base. Needs SMB discount.
- No set budget established.

---
NEXT STEPS
Kevin: Follow up on iframe/embedding question, send pricing with potential SMB discount.
Customer: Complete remaining vendor demos, compare and present to team.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJZRQQAH53C442BFMHAYJJSS

calls.segment_reasoning: SaaS company building structured onboarding courses for their external customers (medical practice end users). Classic customer training use case to improve product adoption.

calls.title: Josh Nick and Kevin Codde
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-05
ATTENDEES: Josh Nick (Emerging See Response), Kevin Codde (kevin.codde@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Emerging See Response
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Fire alarm contractor with ~25 technicians looking to build an employee training program. Currently doing on-the-job training only. Interested in onboarding curriculum, certifications, and quizzes. Standard demo call. Prospect expressed uncertainty about fit given company size vs. platform scale.

---
USE CASE
Internal employee training for fire alarm technicians. New hire onboarding and upskilling existing techs. Content would be video, text, and PDF. Certification tracking for required credentials.

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Not discussed beyond pricing shown ($5K/yr Core plan)
Authority: Josh Nick appears to be decision-maker
Need: Training program for 25 technicians, 3-6 new hires/year
Timeline: Currently building content, no firm deadline

---
RISKS
- Prospect said "I'm not sure if this is the right fit" at end of call
- Small team size (25 techs) may not justify platform cost
- No urgency or timeline commitment

---
NEXT STEPS
Kevin to send pricing in writing. Prospect to review and decide if fit.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJZNWG6EZG2113FBJHWKVV0B

calls.title: Connect with Teachable
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-05
ATTENDEES: Thomas Grobost (Swiss Job Board), Zach McCall (zach.mccall@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Swiss Job Board (name not disclosed)
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Swiss job board company (near-monopoly in Switzerland) wants to offer free recruitment training courses to B2B customers and prospects as a marketing/lead-gen tool. ~100K businesses on platform. Key requirements are SSO integration and white-label embedding. Content is video, quizzes, PDFs. Free courses to drive job ad sales. Technical feasibility (SSO, embedding) is the primary evaluation gate.

---
USE CASE
Free recruitment training courses for B2B job board customers. Target audience: non-HR professionals at small-to-mid companies who need to learn hiring best practices. Courses as lead magnet to drive job ad purchases. Content: video, quizzes, PDF documents.

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Pricing discussed at $7,500/yr (or $7K for 2-year commitment)
Authority: Thomas is evaluating, needs to share with internal team and legal
Need: Free course platform embedded in existing job board with SSO
Timeline: Want something live before June 2026

---
RISKS
- SSO integration complexity is the primary blocker
- Need SOC 2 documentation (requires NDA)
- Internal buy-in needed from tech and legal teams
- 100K businesses means organizations feature may not scale for their use case

---
NEXT STEPS
Zach to send: pricing recap, example school websites, Teachable U access, one-pager/deck, SSO documentation, SOC 2 (after NDA). Follow-up call scheduled March 19.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJWK0C4KVPM5Q9R9DMR9B7VZ

- Uses Stripe for non-Teachable purposes (fundraising via Paid tap-to-pay)

Kevin: Send contract by end of day.
Farhan: Review contract over weekend, follow-up call Monday same time.

calls.title: Connect With Teachable
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-04
ATTENDEES: Steve Kinney (Steve Kinney Audio), Zach McCall (zach.mccall@teachable.com), Jerome Olaloye (jerome.olaloye@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Steve Kinney Audio
STAGE: Discovery / Demo

---
SUMMARY
Audio production educator with long-form 4K video courses (mixing, editing in Pro Tools/Luna). Main concern is large file sizes (courses up to 1.2TB, individual files up to 67GB). Interested in tiered membership/community, private video hosting, SSO with Discord and Shopify, and Shopify integration. Currently uses YouTube (unlisted) for member videos and Shopify for commerce. Exploring Teachable for courses, community, and memberships.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Sell audio production courses and tiered community memberships
Audience: Audio engineers and producers ("pinky out" quality expectations)
Business model: Course sales (currently via Shopify) + planned tiered membership (free/paid/premium)
Content types: Long-form 4K video demonstrations of DAW workflows (Pro Tools, Luna, DaVinci Resolve)
Scale expectations: 2 courses done, 2 more planned. First course ~1.2TB, second ~300GB (compressible to ~100GB)

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Evaluating Growth plan, open to enterprise if storage needs require it. Proposed YouTube ad read partnership to offset costs.
Authority: Steve is sole decision maker.
Need: Large file hosting, tiered community, private video hosting, Shopify or SSO integration.
Timeline: Follow-up call next Monday. Working on compressing files in the meantime.

---
RISKS
- 2GB per-file upload limit may be a hard blocker (individual files 25-67GB pre-compression)
- May need enterprise pricing for storage (multi-terabyte potential)
- Locked into Shopify with existing mailing list and conversion data
- Video embedding limitations in native community

---
NEXT STEPS
Zach: Check if 2GB file limit is bypassable. Investigate Discord SSO and Shopify SSO options. Check on ad read partnership possibility. Provide sandbox account. Follow up next Monday.
Steve: Compress all course files via Handbrake to determine actual storage needs. Assess file sizes.

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJFZYVA6H3WCHZ5MFV3KC811

calls.title: Kyle A Jones and Zach McCall
calls.hubspot_note:
CALL DATE: 2026-03-03
ATTENDEES: Rick Johnson (Refinery Pass), Kyle Jones (Refinery Pass), Zach McCall (zach.mccall@teachable.com)
COMPANY: Refinery Pass
STAGE: Follow-up Demo / Technical Validation

---
SUMMARY
Follow-up call with Refinery Pass (refinery safety training, 50K+ students). Rick and Kyle are validating remaining concerns after watching a demo video twice. Key topics: course expiration for compliance, custom enrollment fields (birthday for identity), AI support chatbot to eliminate 5AM customer service, white label app, Shopify integration, seat reassignment, and browser compatibility. Very strong buying signals. Rick estimates 90% cost savings vs Docebo ($60K/yr). Targeting Docebo contract end (March 31) for migration. Planning to meet with Lenny on organizations feature next week.

---
USE CASE
Primary goal: Refinery safety training and credentialing for contractors
Audience: Blue collar contractors at refineries across US
Business model: B2B training sold per-seat to contractor companies via Shopify, plus individual purchases
Current pain: Subscription code fulfillment requires 5AM customer support; SCORM/Safari bugs; Docebo at $60K/yr with limited support
Scale: 50K+ student database, ~2K new students/month, 60+ courses

---
QUALIFICATION
Budget: Currently paying ~$60K/yr for Docebo. Teachable at ~$6,500/yr. Open to AI chatbot add-on ($8-15K one-time).
Authority: Rick Johnson (decision-maker), Kyle Jones (technical lead)
Need: Eliminate subscription code fulfillment, course expiration, seat reassignment, browser compatibility, mobile app
Timeline: Docebo quarterly contract due March 31. Six-week window to migrate. Decision expected before Friday.

---
RISKS
- Breaking Docebo contract may cause friction ("it's gonna get messy")
- Currently using Shopify for checkout, need API/webhook bridge until Q4 migration
- Organizations feature still being built (need early access)
- No custom enrollment fields for birthday/identity disambiguation

---
PRICING DISCUSSED
Plan discussed: Growth plan (~$6,500/yr)
AI chatbot: $8-15K one-time custom build
White label app: $4-8K one-time
Docebo comparison: $60K/yr current spend

---
NEXT STEPS
Zach: Set up meeting with Lenny (organizations product team) for Monday/Tuesday. Scope AI support chatbot. Send sandbox account. Investigate extending trial period.
Rick/Kyle: Test sandbox. Make migration decision before Friday. Meet with Lenny re: organizations.

---
BUYING SIGNALS
- "I didn't see a problem to begin with. And after this conversation, I really don't see problem."
- "This is probably damn near perfect solution for what we are at."
- "I wish we had this opportunity to have this conversation about six years ago."
- Targeting decision before Friday, Docebo contract end March 31

---
TRANSCRIPT: https://app.fireflies.ai/view/01KJRC7JYT5GX679216C5A49HY

buying_signals.interpretation: Committed to content creation, serious about building the academy.

marketing_data.timeline: Wants access immediately. CSM onboarding starting around March 2. Daniel available from March 5 after travel.

calls.segment_reasoning: Norway-based company building an academy with multiple clients and programs. Likely B2B training provider, but insufficient detail to confirm segment with high confidence.

recap: This week's calls reveal a clear pattern: the continuing education / compliance training ICP is gaining traction across both internal strategy and external prospects. Dot Compliance (compliance training for commercial drivers) progressed from initial hands-on testing to detailed integration planning with all content uploaded. BADM (nonprofit) is ready to sign an Unlimited contract. Speravita (nonprofit pregnancy resource centers) brought Teachable's product team into a deep organizational scoping call with 115 centers and Q2 launch plans. The Singapore Land Transport Authority is moving toward Q2 launch for vulnerable commuter training in Mandarin. Simon & Sabine's Australian coaching program has a clear automation blocker but is willing to commit if the integration architecture is feasible. Anne Blocker / ESI, a long-time customer on two platforms, gave extensive feedback that perfectly aligns with the Learning Experience team's top 3 priorities (learning paths, quizzes, certificates). Internally, the sales council rallied behind targeting CE credential providers, while the win/loss review surfaced recurring blockers: SCORM, cart/bundle checkout, custom checkout fields, and pricing page confusion continue to cost deals.

AI Chatbot / Support Bot.coverage_notes: No native AI chatbot or support bot. Third-party tools like Intercom/Drift can be embedded via code snippets.

AI Tutor / Copilot Integration.coverage_notes: Teachable has AI Course Starter and AI Quiz Generator, but no in-course AI tutor or copilot for learners.

Access Duration / Expiration.coverage_notes: Courses can be set to expire after a number of days from enrollment. No calendar-date expiration per student.

Admin / Teacher Reporting.coverage_notes: Course-level and student-level reports available. No custom dashboard builder or advanced role-based reporting views.

Affiliate / Referral Program.coverage_notes: Built-in affiliate program with custom commission rates, cookie duration, and affiliate dashboard. Builder plan and above.

Asynchronous / Self-paced Learning.coverage_notes: Core product model. All courses are self-paced by default with optional drip scheduling.

Auto-tagging / User Segmentation.coverage_notes: No native auto-tagging. Achievable via webhooks firing on enrollment/completion events to external CRM or via API custom fields.

Automated Assessment Delivery.coverage_notes: Auto-graded quizzes with multiple choice and short answer. No timed quizzes, question banks, or manual grading.

Automated Certificates.coverage_notes: Certificates of completion auto-issued on course finish. 3 templates. Builder+ only. No QR codes, serial numbers, or external credential storage.

Automated Report Export.coverage_notes: Manual CSV export from dashboard. Automated export possible via API (Growth+) or Zapier (Builder+). No native scheduled reports.

Avoid Email for Document Distribution.coverage_notes: PDFs and documents can be delivered as course content or digital downloads — no email distribution needed.

Bulk / Group Payment.coverage_notes: No native group checkout. Bulk import (Growth+) can enroll groups after offline payment. API-based enrollment also possible.

Bulk Student Import.coverage_notes: CSV bulk import of students on Growth+ plans. Also available via API.

Bulk Student Upload.coverage_notes: CSV bulk upload of students on Growth+ plans. Also available via API.

Bulk User Import.coverage_notes: CSV bulk import of users on Growth+ plans. Also available via API.

Calendly Integration for Coaching Bookin.coverage_notes: Native Calendly integration for coaching booking. Embeddable scheduling in coaching products.

Cart / Bundle Checkout.coverage_notes: Bundles supported. Order bumps and upsells at checkout. No multi-item cart — each purchase is a single transaction.

Certificate Automation.coverage_notes: Auto-issued on course completion. 3 templates, student name and course name personalization. Builder+ only. No QR codes or external credential storage.

Certificate Customization.coverage_notes: 3 certificate templates with limited customization. Builder+ only. No full custom design, no logo upload, limited layout options.

Certificate Storage / User Profile.coverage_notes: Certificates can be downloaded but no persistent certificate wallet or profile page listing earned certificates.

Certification & Credentialing.coverage_notes: Basic completion certificates (Builder+). No formal credentialing, no digital badges, no continuing education credits, no accreditation integration.

Checklist / To-Do Functionality.coverage_notes: No native checklist or to-do content block. Could embed external tool or use quiz as a checklist proxy.

Checkout / Sales Page UX.coverage_notes: Built-in sales page builder and checkout flow. Coupons, order bumps, upsells, abandoned cart emails. No A/B testing on sales pages.

Coach Pay-Per-Session Model.coverage_notes: Coaching products support one-time or subscription pricing. Per-session billing not native — workaround: create separate coaching product per session or use payment plans.

Coach View of Student Submissions.coverage_notes: Coaches can view short-answer quiz submissions in the admin. No dedicated submission review interface or inline feedback tools.

Coach-Assigned Custom Documents.coverage_notes: No ability for coaches to assign personalized documents to individual students within the platform.

Coach-Specific Digital Downloads.coverage_notes: Digital downloads are a product type. Coach-specific downloads can be separate products. No per-student customization within a single product.

Coaching / Mentoring Sessions.coverage_notes: Native coaching product type with milestone-based structure. Live sessions via embedded Zoom/YouTube/Vimeo. No native video calling.

Coaching Embedded in Course Flow.coverage_notes: Courses and coaching can be bundled. Coaching milestones can align with course sections. Not deeply integrated — separate product types linked by bundle.

Comment Moderation.coverage_notes: Lesson-level comments with moderation (approve/delete). No threaded discussions, no mention system, no comment search.

Community Access Controls.coverage_notes: Community access tied to product enrollment. Can restrict to specific courses/bundles. No granular permission levels within community.

Community Categories/Forums.coverage_notes: Community spaces with categories/topics. Not traditional forum structure — more social-feed style. No sub-forums or threading.

Community Discussion.coverage_notes: Native community with discussion posts, likes, and comments. Available on all plans.

Community Feature.coverage_notes: Built-in community feature with posts, comments, likes, and spaces. All plans. No community analytics.

Community Features.coverage_notes: Built-in community with posts, comments, likes, spaces. All plans. No advanced moderation tools or community analytics.

Community Navigation from Course.coverage_notes: Students can navigate to community from course player. Per-course community linking supported.

Community Username/Privacy Controls.expert_ref: Community Features — username and privacy controls
Community Username/Privacy Controls.coverage_notes: Community username and privacy controls available natively.

Competitive Pricing for High-Volume User.coverage_notes: Tiered plans from Free to Pro+. No transaction fees on paid plans. Volume pricing not publicly documented — likely negotiable for enterprise.

Completion Tracking.coverage_notes: Per-lesson and per-course completion tracking. Sequential progress, video completion requirements, quiz passing gates. Reports exportable.

Compliance Controls.coverage_notes: Sequential lesson enforcement, video completion requirements, quiz pass gates. No SCORM, no timed sessions, no formal audit trail.

Compliance Training.coverage_notes: Sequential lessons, video completion, quiz gates, and certificates. Suitable for basic compliance. No SCORM, no audit trails, no recertification workflows.

Content Embedding.coverage_notes: Native embed block supports Zoom, YouTube, Vimeo, Google Docs, Typeform, and other iframe-embeddable content.

Content Migration.coverage_notes: No automated content migration tool. Teachable offers white-glove onboarding assistance. Manual migration or API-based transfer (Growth+).

Content Portability / Data Ownership.coverage_notes: Student data exportable via CSV. Course content created by owner. No bulk content export tool — videos hosted on Teachable's CDN.

Content Portability / Export.coverage_notes: Content can be exported from the Teachable site. Student/enrollment data exportable via CSV. API access on Growth+ for programmatic export.

Content Presentation & Layout.coverage_notes: Drag-and-drop page builder for sales pages. Course lessons support text, video, audio, PDF, embed, quiz blocks. CSS snippets for customization.

Content Protection / DRM.coverage_notes: Wistia-powered video hosting with basic protection. No download button by default. No advanced DRM, watermarking, or screen capture prevention.

Course + Coaching Bundle.coverage_notes: Courses, coaching, digital downloads, and community can be bundled together as a single purchasable product.

Course Bundles.coverage_notes: Native bundle product type. Combine courses, coaching, downloads. Single pricing with coupons and payment plans.

Course Commerce / Transactions.coverage_notes: teachable:pay handles payments in 130+ currencies with automated tax. One-time, subscription, payment plans. No transaction fees on paid plans.

Course Completion Tracking.coverage_notes: Per-lesson and per-course completion with percentage progress. Reports available in admin. Sequential enforcement optional.

Course Content Editing / Updates.coverage_notes: Edit course content anytime — add/remove/reorder lessons and sections. Changes apply to all enrolled students immediately.

Course Embedding on External Website.expert_ref: Courses can be integrated into existing website
Course Embedding on External Website.coverage_notes: Courses can be integrated into an existing website. Custom domain for seamless branding. WordPress plugin available for direct embedding.

Course Filtering / Catalog.coverage_notes: Courses displayed on school homepage. Categories/collections available. No advanced search or filter UI for large catalogs.

Course Limit Increase.coverage_notes: Free plan: 1 course. Builder: 5. Pro: unlimited. Pro+: unlimited. Upgrade plan for more courses.

Course Module Structure.coverage_notes: Courses organized into sections (modules) with lessons. Drag-and-drop reordering. No nested sub-sections.

Course Quizzes / Assessments.coverage_notes: Multiple choice (auto-graded) and short answer. AI quiz generator. No timed quizzes, question banks, randomization, or manual grading.

Course Sequencing / Completion Gating.coverage_notes: Sequential lesson enforcement — students must complete previous lesson before accessing next. Video completion and quiz pass gates.

Cross-Course Community Access.coverage_notes: Community spaces can be linked to multiple courses/products or made school-wide. Students in any linked product get access.

Custom Branding.coverage_notes: Custom domain, logo, colors, page builder. CSS snippets for advanced styling. White-label (remove Teachable branding) on Growth+.

Custom Branding / White-label.coverage_notes: Full white-label (remove Teachable branding) on Growth+. Custom domain on all plans. Custom CSS on all plans.

Custom Checkout Fields.coverage_notes: Custom fields on enrollment/registration forms. Fields appear in student admin and CSV exports.

Custom Coupon Codes.coverage_notes: Custom coupon codes with percentage or fixed discount, expiry dates, usage limits. Available on all plans.

Custom Development / Add-ons.coverage_notes: API and webhooks on Growth+ enable custom development. CSS snippets on all plans. No plugin/extension marketplace.

Custom Registration Fields.coverage_notes: Add custom fields to enrollment forms. Text, dropdown, checkbox types. Data accessible in admin and exports.

Custom Role Labels.coverage_notes: Custom user roles with configurable permissions on Growth+ plans. Can create role labels for different admin types.

Custom Themes.coverage_notes: Page builder with templates for sales pages and course pages. CSS snippets for advanced styling. Not full theme marketplace — more template-based.

Customizable Completion Button.coverage_notes: Completion button text and behavior not customizable. Standard 'Complete & Continue' button.

Demographic Data Collection for Funder R.coverage_notes: Custom registration fields can collect demographic data. Export via CSV for funder reporting. No pre-built funder report templates.

Department-based Student Groups.coverage_notes: B2B Bulk Distribution in closed beta (2026) includes organization-level enrollment. Native department grouping not yet available.

Digital Course Delivery.coverage_notes: Core product — online course creation and delivery with video, text, PDFs, quizzes, and downloads.

Drip / Timed Content Release.coverage_notes: Drip scheduling by days after enrollment or fixed calendar date. Per-section drip. All plans.

Drip Content Scheduling.coverage_notes: Schedule content release by days after enrollment or fixed date. Section-level drip. Available on all plans.

Embed Courses in Existing Website.expert_ref: Courses can be integrated into existing website
Embed Courses in Existing Website.coverage_notes: Courses can be integrated into an existing website. Custom domain for seamless branding. WordPress plugin available for direct embedding.

Embedded Course Widget.expert_ref: External checkout embeddable, WordPress plugin available
Embedded Course Widget.coverage_notes: External checkout links can be embedded. WordPress plugin available. Full course player cannot be iframed into external sites.

File Upload & Grading.coverage_notes: No student file upload for assignments. No manual grading system. Short-answer quizzes exist but are text-only.

Flexible Course Limits.coverage_notes: Free: 1 course, Builder: 5, Pro: unlimited, Pro+: unlimited. Upgrade plan for more courses.

Freemium / Free Course Support.coverage_notes: Free courses supported on all plans. Set price to $0 for freemium model. Lead capture via free enrollment.

GDPR Compliance.coverage_notes: GDPR-compliant data handling, student data export/deletion tools. Privacy policy and cookie consent available.

Gamification & Interactive Learning.coverage_notes: No native gamification (badges, points, leaderboards, XP). No branching/conditional learning paths.

Government Tax Exemption.coverage_notes: teachable:pay handles automated tax collection. Tax-exempt purchases may require manual coupon or offline processing. No native tax-exempt checkout flow.

Group / Bulk License Purchasing.coverage_notes: No native group license checkout. Bulk import (Growth+) enrolls after offline payment. API-based enrollment possible. B2B bulk distribution in beta.

Guest Checkout.coverage_notes: Students must create an account to purchase. No guest checkout without account creation.

Headless / API Access.coverage_notes: REST API on Growth+ plans. Students, courses, enrollments, and transactions endpoints. Not a full headless CMS — no content delivery API.

Hybrid Scheduling.coverage_notes: Combine self-paced drip courses with scheduled coaching sessions (embedded Zoom/Calendly). No unified hybrid calendar.

In-Course Zoom Integration.coverage_notes: Zoom meetings/webinars can be embedded in course lessons via embed block. Not a native integration — requires manual link/embed setup.

In-Platform Messaging to Students.coverage_notes: Built-in email to enrolled students on Builder+. No in-app messaging/DMs, no real-time chat, no push notifications.

In-platform Recording / Replay.coverage_notes: No in-platform recording. Videos must be uploaded from local files. Can embed Zoom replay links. No native live-to-replay pipeline.

Inactive User Reporting.coverage_notes: Student reports show last sign-in and progress. No pre-built inactive user report. Filterable via CSV export or API queries.

Integrated One-on-One Coaching Sessions.coverage_notes: Native coaching product type with milestones. No native video calling — embed Zoom/Calendly. Milestone-based progress tracking.

Interactive Image Hotspots.coverage_notes: No interactive image hotspot content type. Would require external tool embed (e.g., H5P, Genially).

Interactive Quizzes.coverage_notes: Multiple choice (auto-graded) and short answer quizzes. AI quiz generator. No drag-and-drop, matching, hotspot, or multimedia question types.

Internal vs External Course Access.coverage_notes: Courses can be published, hidden (direct link only), or draft. No separate internal/external access tiers on same course.

International Payment Processing.coverage_notes: teachable:pay supports 130+ currencies with automated sales tax, VAT, and GST. Available on all plans.

International Payout Compliance.coverage_notes: teachable:pay handles multi-currency payouts. Tax compliance automated. Specifics of payout methods and country support may vary.

Intuitive Course Builder.coverage_notes: Drag-and-drop course editor with sections and lessons. Multiple content types. User-friendly for non-technical creators.

Knowledge Base / Wiki.coverage_notes: No native knowledge base or wiki feature. Course structure is linear, not wiki-style. No native blogging either.

Landing Pages / Site Builder.coverage_notes: Built-in page builder for sales pages, thank you pages, and school homepage. Drag-and-drop blocks. No A/B testing.

Lead Capture / Email Collection.coverage_notes: Free course enrollment captures email. Built-in email marketing (Builder+). Zapier integration to external ESP (Builder+).

Learner File Upload to Coaches.coverage_notes: No learner file upload capability. Coaching milestones are text-based. Workaround: use external file sharing (Google Drive, Dropbox links in comments).

Learner UX / Course Journey.coverage_notes: Clean course player with progress bar, section navigation, and mobile app. No personalized learning paths or adaptive content.

Live Coaching & Webinars.expert_ref: Live webinars available through coaching tool
Live Coaching & Webinars.coverage_notes: Live webinars supported natively through the coaching product. Coaching milestones for scheduling and delivery.

Live Coaching Sessions.expert_ref: Native coaching product with live session support
Live Coaching Sessions.coverage_notes: Native coaching product type supports live sessions. Coaching milestones for scheduling and delivery.

Live Webinar / Coaching.expert_ref: Live webinars available through coaching tool
Live Webinar / Coaching.coverage_notes: Live webinars and coaching sessions supported natively through the coaching product.

Live Webinars.expert_ref: Live webinars available through coaching tool
Live Webinars.coverage_notes: Live webinars supported natively through the coaching product.

Local Payment Gateway Support.coverage_notes: teachable:pay supports 130+ currencies and local payment methods via Stripe. Some regional gateways may not be supported.

Mandatory Video Completion.coverage_notes: Video completion can be required before progressing to next lesson. Part of course compliance settings.

Membership / Subscription Pricing.coverage_notes: Native membership product type with recurring billing. Monthly/annual subscriptions. No pause subscription feature.

Microsoft Teams Integration.coverage_notes: No native Microsoft Teams integration. Could embed Teams meeting links manually or use Zapier (Builder+) for notification bridging.

Minimum Time on Page.coverage_notes: No minimum time-on-page enforcement. Video completion required is the closest compliance control. No timed lessons.

Mobile App Access.coverage_notes: Native iOS and Android apps for course consumption. All plans. Android offline mode coming soon.

Mobile App Course Delivery.coverage_notes: Full course delivery on iOS and Android apps. Video playback, quizzes, progress tracking. Android offline mode in development.

Multi-Currency Checkout.coverage_notes: 130+ currencies supported via teachable:pay. Automated currency conversion. All plans.

Multi-Format Content (PDF, Video, Podcas.coverage_notes: Video, text, PDF, audio (including podcast-style), images, and embed blocks. No native podcast RSS feed generation.

Multi-format Content Upload.coverage_notes: Upload video, audio, PDFs, images. Embed external content. Bulk upload supported.

Multi-language Support.coverage_notes: AI subtitles and translation on Growth+ (unlimited). Platform interface is English-only. No native multi-language course versions. Workaround: separate courses per language.

Multimedia Course Authoring.coverage_notes: Video, text, audio, PDF, images, embed blocks, and quizzes. Drag-and-drop editor. AI course starter for initial structure.

Multiple Admin Roles & Permissions.coverage_notes: Custom user roles with configurable permissions on Growth+ plans. Owner, admin, author, and custom roles.

Multiple Admin Users.coverage_notes: Multiple authors/instructors on all plans. Custom roles with granular permissions on Growth+.

Multiple Schools.coverage_notes: Creators can run multiple Teachable schools from one account. Each school has its own domain, branding, and courses.

Offline Content Access.coverage_notes: Android offline mode coming soon. iOS offline not confirmed. Currently requires internet connection for course access.

On-Demand Replay / Recorded Webinars.coverage_notes: Upload recorded webinars as video lessons. Native video hosting with Wistia. No live-to-replay pipeline — manual upload required.

One-time Purchase Pricing.coverage_notes: One-time purchase, payment plans, and subscriptions all supported. All plans.

Online Course Delivery.coverage_notes: Core product — create and deliver online courses with video, text, quizzes, downloads, and certificates.

Online Training Platform.coverage_notes: Full online training platform with courses, coaching, community, downloads, and commerce.

Open-ended Questions / Journal.coverage_notes: Short-answer quiz questions serve as open-ended responses. No journal/diary feature. No rich-text student responses.

Organization Groups & Reporting.coverage_notes: B2B Bulk Distribution in closed beta includes organization-level enrollment and reporting. Not generally available yet.

Organization Hierarchy / Nesting.coverage_notes: No nested organization hierarchy. B2B beta offers flat org enrollment but no parent/child org structures.

Organization Reporting.coverage_notes: Organization-level reporting coming with B2B Bulk Distribution beta. Currently limited to student-level reports.

Organization Reporting & Leaderboards.coverage_notes: No leaderboards. Organization reporting in B2B beta but leaderboards are not part of it. No gamification.

Organization Seat Management.coverage_notes: Seat management coming with B2B Bulk Distribution beta. Currently requires manual bulk import or API enrollment.

Organization-level Reporting.coverage_notes: Organization-level reporting in B2B Bulk Distribution closed beta (2026). Not generally available.

Organizations & Group Enrollment.coverage_notes: B2B Bulk Distribution in closed beta (2026). Includes org-level enrollment and seat management. Currently: bulk import (Growth+) or API.

Organizations / Department Segmentation.coverage_notes: Department segmentation not native. B2B beta may support basic org grouping. No department-level course assignments yet.

Organizations / Group Management.coverage_notes: B2B Bulk Distribution in closed beta. Includes organization and group enrollment. Currently: bulk import (Growth+) or API.

Organizations / Multi-tenancy.coverage_notes: Multiple separate schools per account (multi-tenancy at school level). Not org-level tenancy within a single school — that's B2B beta.

PDF / Digital Downloads in Courses.coverage_notes: PDFs as course lesson content and as standalone digital download products. All plans.

PayPal Integration.coverage_notes: teachable:pay is Stripe-based. No native PayPal integration. PayPal was previously supported but deprecated in favor of teachable:pay.

Payment Collection & Revenue Tracking.coverage_notes: Built-in payment processing with revenue dashboard, transaction history, and payout tracking. All plans.

Payment Plans / Installments.coverage_notes: Native payment plan support with configurable installment schedules. All plans.

Per-Course Community.coverage_notes: Community spaces can be linked to specific courses. Students get access upon enrollment.

Per-Student Course Customization by Coac.coverage_notes: All enrolled students see the same course content. No per-student customization, conditional content, or coach-assigned variations.

Phone / Alternative Login.coverage_notes: Email + password is default. Google SSO on Builder+. No phone/SMS login. No social login (Facebook, Apple). SAML/enterprise SSO not supported.

Pre/Post Survey Integration.coverage_notes: No native survey tool. Embed Typeform, Google Forms, or SurveyMonkey in lessons via embed block. Data stays in external tool.

Purchase Order / Invoice Billing.coverage_notes: No purchase order or invoice billing flow. All payments are credit card/debit via Stripe. No net-30 or enterprise invoicing.

Push Notifications.coverage_notes: No push notifications from Teachable mobile app. Email notifications only. No in-app notification center.

Quiz / Assessment Builder.coverage_notes: Quiz builder with multiple choice and short answer. AI quiz generator. No question banks, timed quizzes, or randomization.

Quiz / Assessment Reporting.coverage_notes: Quiz scores visible in student reports. Per-question analytics limited. No item analysis or difficulty metrics.

Quiz Question Types.coverage_notes: Multiple choice and short answer only. No matching, ordering, fill-in-blank, drag-and-drop, hotspot, or essay with rubric.

Quizzes & Assessments.coverage_notes: Auto-graded multiple choice and short answer. AI quiz generator. No timed quizzes, question banks, or manual grading.

Quizzes & Graded Assessments.coverage_notes: Auto-graded quizzes with pass/fail. Short answer viewable by admin but no manual scoring. No rubric-based grading.

Registration Gating.coverage_notes: Courses require enrollment to access. Can gate by payment, free enrollment, or direct link. No prerequisites between courses natively.

Reporting Dashboard.coverage_notes: Built-in reporting dashboard with revenue, enrollment, and completion metrics. No custom dashboard builder or advanced analytics.

Reporting Data Export (CSV).coverage_notes: CSV export of student data, enrollments, transactions, and quiz results. Available on all plans.

Responsive Customer Support.coverage_notes: Email support on all plans. Priority support on higher tiers. White-glove onboarding on Growth+.

Retroactive Community Access.coverage_notes: Not clear if adding community to a course retroactively grants access to previously enrolled students. Needs manual verification.

Role-based Access.coverage_notes: Custom roles with configurable permissions on Growth+. Owner, admin, author roles on lower plans.

SCORM Compliance.coverage_notes: No SCORM or xAPI support. Cannot import SCORM packages or track SCORM-compliant interactions.

SCORM Support.coverage_notes: No SCORM or xAPI support. Cannot import or play SCORM content packages.

SOC 2 Type 2 Security.coverage_notes: SOC 2 Type 2 certification status not confirmed in platform documentation. Teachable handles payment security via Stripe. Needs verification with Teachable security team.

SSO / SAML.expert_ref: Google SSO available Builder+. SAML/enterprise SSO not supported.
SSO / SAML.coverage_notes: Google SSO on Builder+. SAML and enterprise SSO (Okta, Azure AD, etc.) not supported natively. API-based custom SSO flow possible on Growth+.

Seat / User Management.coverage_notes: Student management with enrollment, progress, and manual add/remove. No seat-license model natively — B2B beta adds this.

Seat Management.coverage_notes: Seat-based license management coming with B2B Bulk Distribution beta. Currently requires manual enrollment management.

Sequential Course Navigation.coverage_notes: Sequential lesson enforcement available. Students must complete previous lesson before accessing next.

Shopify SSO Integration.coverage_notes: No native Shopify SSO or direct integration. Workaround via Zapier (Builder+) — webhook triggers on Shopify purchase to API enroll.

Single Sign-On (SSO).coverage_notes: Google SSO on Builder+. No SAML, Okta, Azure AD, or enterprise SSO. Limited to Google as the only SSO provider.

Structured Multi-Week Course.coverage_notes: Sections and lessons with drip scheduling enable structured multi-week course delivery. All plans.

Student Community.coverage_notes: Built-in community with discussion posts, comments, and likes. Linked to courses/products. All plans.

Student File Upload for Assignments.coverage_notes: No student file upload for assignments or submissions. Text-only short answer quizzes. No manual grading workflow.

Student Onboarding Workflow.coverage_notes: No dedicated onboarding workflow builder. Use introductory course section, welcome email (Builder+), and drip content as onboarding proxy.

Student Profile in Mobile App.coverage_notes: Student profile accessible in mobile app with enrolled courses and progress. Limited profile customization.

Student Progress Tracking.coverage_notes: Per-lesson and per-course progress tracking. Admin reports show completion rates, quiz scores, and enrollment data. All plans.

Student-Counselor Assignment.coverage_notes: No native student-to-counselor/coach assignment system. All coaching product enrollees interact with the same coach. No routing or caseload management.

Subscription Migration (Braintree to Str.coverage_notes: Teachable migrated to teachable:pay (Stripe-based). Migration from legacy Braintree subscriptions would need Teachable support assistance. Not self-service.

Supervisor Role Access.coverage_notes: Custom roles with configurable permissions on Growth+. Can create supervisor-type role with limited admin access.

Test Student / Preview Mode.coverage_notes: Admins can preview courses as students. No separate test student account creation tool.

Third-party Integration.coverage_notes: Zapier on Builder+, webhooks and API on Growth+. Native integrations: Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Segment.

Tiered Membership Access.coverage_notes: Create multiple membership products at different price points with different course bundles. No native upgrade/downgrade flow between tiers.

Training Completion Dashboard.coverage_notes: Built-in reports showing completion rates, progress, and enrollment data. No custom dashboard builder.

Unlimited Student Enrollment.coverage_notes: Unlimited students on all plans. No per-student fees.

User-Friendly Interface for Non-Technica.coverage_notes: Drag-and-drop course editor and page builder designed for non-technical creators. No coding required for basic usage.

Video Content Hosting.coverage_notes: Native video hosting powered by Wistia. Unlimited video uploads on all plans. Basic content protection, no advanced DRM.

Video Scrub Prevention.coverage_notes: Video completion enforcement prevents skipping. Students must watch to a completion threshold. Some scrub prevention built into compliance mode.

Video Streaming Reliability.coverage_notes: Wistia-powered video with CDN delivery. Adaptive bitrate streaming. Reliable for standard usage.

Virtual Campus / Online Academy.coverage_notes: Each Teachable school serves as a virtual campus with custom domain, branding, course catalog, and community. All plans.

Voiceover for Courses.coverage_notes: Audio content supported as lesson type. Upload pre-recorded voiceover files. No in-platform recording or text-to-speech.

Webhook Support.coverage_notes: Webhooks on Growth+ plans. Events: enrollment, completion, transaction. Custom webhook endpoints for external integrations.

Website Builder / Design Flexibility.coverage_notes: Drag-and-drop page builder for sales and course pages. Custom CSS snippets. Not a full website builder — focused on school/course pages.

Website Embed / Link Integration.coverage_notes: Custom domain for seamless linking. Can link from external website to Teachable courses. No iframe embed of full course player.

White Glove / Managed Course Build.coverage_notes: White-glove onboarding and course migration assistance on Growth+ plans. Dedicated onboarding specialist.

White Glove Onboarding.coverage_notes: White-glove onboarding with dedicated specialist on Growth+ plans.

White Label Platform.coverage_notes: Remove Teachable branding on Growth+ plans. Custom domain on all plans.

White Label Website.coverage_notes: Remove all Teachable branding from student-facing pages on Growth+ plans.

White-Label Mobile App.coverage_notes: Teachable mobile app is branded as Teachable. No white-label mobile app with custom branding/app store listing.

White-label App.coverage_notes: No white-label mobile app. Students use the Teachable-branded app. No custom app store listing.

Worksheets & PDF Uploads.coverage_notes: PDFs uploadable as lesson content or digital downloads. No interactive worksheet/form feature — static PDFs only.

Zapier Integration for Enrollment.coverage_notes: Zapier integration on Builder+ plans. Trigger enrollment via Zap from external events (Shopify purchase, form submission, etc.).
